name: @orrgal1/diagnose
description: Portable, repo-agnostic diagnostic toolkit. /root-cause runs hypothesis-driven RCA with parallel investigation. /hypothesize is a lightweight 2–4 candidate hypothesis loop for local bugs. /pepper scatters uniquely-tagged trace logs through suspect code, runs the repro, greps, and cleans up. /trace streams noisy process output to files for targeted extraction. No arnac coupling — usable in any repo.
